raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The draft has a coherence problem: a related-work block is inserted between two results sections, and the ImageNet-C paragraph and ablation paragraph appear without connecting tissue; improving the draft plausibly requires ensuring premises and conclusions chain logically across paragraphs.","R1.5":"The related-work paragraph is structurally misplaced — it surfaces mid-results rather than in a dedicated prior-work section — making section ordering a candidate load-bearing dimension depending on the scope of 'improve.'","R1.6":"Writing polish is the most natural primary reading of 'improve this draft'; sentence clarity, paragraph flow, and prose quality are load-bearing regardless of whether structural work is also in scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I restructure the section order (e.g., extract and relocate the related-work paragraph to its own section before or after the results), or focus on improving prose quality and clarity within the current structure?"}

rationale.R1.2: The draft has a coherence problem: a related-work block is inserted between two results sections, and the ImageNet-C paragraph and ablation paragraph appear without connecting tissue; improving the draft plausibly requires ensuring premises and conclusions chain logically across paragraphs.
rationale.R1.5: The related-work paragraph is structurally misplaced — it surfaces mid-results rather than in a dedicated prior-work section — making section ordering a candidate load-bearing dimension depending on the scope of 'improve.'
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the most natural primary reading of 'improve this draft'; sentence clarity, paragraph flow, and prose quality are load-bearing regardless of whether structural work is also in scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I restructure the section order (e.g., extract and relocate the related-work paragraph to its own section before or after the results), or focus on improving prose quality and clarity within the current structure?
